result.summary: Implemented all four Phase-1 sub-tasks in report_ast.py + cellcog_composer.py. §1.1: strengthened the identity handoff in CardBundle._resolve — it imports the canonical event_ledger.IDENTITY_PROVEN allowlist (not copied, no venue allowlist) and now fails closed unless the resolver's full tuple is a proven ADMIT (disposition==ADMIT, reason_code==RC_ADMITTED, identity_verdict in IDENTITY_PROVEN, names_expression_id not None); verified this cannot break any currently-admitted case (the resolver's admit path guarantees that exact tuple). §1.2: rewrote CardBundle._index_person so function words (the/of/on/behalf/for/and/by) NEVER enter _source_words — corporate bylines index only the whole phrase plus explicit ALL-CAPS acronyms, individuals index their surname (one-token names Wu/Ng kept, terminal surname with particles like van/de excluded); confirmed the plan's poison case 'on behalf of the INSPIRING Project Consortium' no longer leaks 'the'/'of' while Acemoglu/Wu/Ng and the exact corporate phrase stay detectable. §1.3: added report_ast.set_facet_contract() and had the composer inject the SAME planner_contract used by find_bundles() so _premise_with_span_facets() re-derives facets against identical vocabulary+polarity (the missing polarity map was a silent second path to 0). §1.4: added frozen ProvenVerdict(Owned) with an operation field, a deterministic-only factory (make_proven_verdict/proven_verdict_or_failures — the LLM JSON parser still builds only plain Owned so a model can never forge one), validation that re-resolves premises, re-derives span facets, re-runs validate()+prove(), requires the declared operation to match the text's licensed claim, and skips ONLY the redundant GLM frame judge; wired the composer's _verdict_node to build it and added the candidate/source-name/missing-unit/unproved/placed refusal histogram. Functionally proved end-to-end: a ProvenVerdict validates clean with the frame judge stubbed to fail-closed (judge skipped) while an ordinary Owned still routes through it (SYNTHESIS_SMUGGLES_A_FINDING), and forged/operation-mismatch/no-premise/same-source instances all reject. Did NOT git commit.
result.blocker: Fidelity note (not blocking): §1.4's canonical template is the planner's existing closed _verdict_text template set rather than newly-authored prose — full byte-for-byte re-render-and-equality at validation isn't possible without the planner Bundle, which isn't available in report_ast's validator. Forge-resistance is instead guaranteed by frozen-dataclass + deterministic-only construction (LLM parser emits only plain Owned) + operation-must-equal-classify(text) + full proof re-run, so text/operation cannot drift. Verdict prose is unchanged, so no RACE-scoring drift risk. P4 preflight (sound cross-source verdicts placed > 0) remains the real placement gate and is a separate phase.
